title: [security] Replay table poisoning via unauthenticated LRU eviction (P0)
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/replay.c:233-238 (WARNING comment) + lichen_replay_get() called before full Schnorr auth in some paths (lichen_link_rx.c:122,243). Attacker floods distinct EUIs to evict legitimate peers from 16-slot table, enabling replay of captured frames (bypasses sliding window on seq/epoch). Combined with weak MIC = catastrophic. Even with constant-time EUI compare, no pre-auth gate. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-lw4f
close_reason: Fixed unauthenticated replay table access paths, updated security comments, prevented double-replay commit in constant-time peer scan (project-LICHEN-bbti)
